utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like to book a flight from JFK to San Diego on June 1st. Look up to buy at Lifelight for the book of JFK to go to this NBA.

utterances.text: I was able to locate a flight by American Airlines for $2,557. This flight will depart at 5:59 p.m. and more arrive at 9:02 p.m. This is a first-class non-stop flight for two adults. Is there anything else you need?

utterances.text: Goodbye.

utterances.text: This Sunday. So, the 29th, I'll be leaving. And I'll be coming back 5 days after that. And I need you to find the flights, latest possible.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What class would you like to sit?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Coach. That's my preference. And can you find one nonstop, as well?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Is this a round-trip flight?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, the rest are round trip.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have a price limit?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I only found one nonstop flight and it leaves in the afternoon, is that okay?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, it's great. What time does it leave? And can you tell me the return flight details, as well?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The flight leaves San Francisco at 3:35 p.m. and arrives in Amsterdam 9:50 a.m. the return flight will leave Amsterdam at 10:25 a.m. and return to San Francisco at 1:25 p.m. Would you like me to book this?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have booked the flight and I will email you the itinerary.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Thanks, Google.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like help finding a flight to Brussels.

utterances.text: What seating class?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, good.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: United airlines.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Good.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you. I will. Bye.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello.

utterances.text: Hi. I'm trying to book a flight from San Francisco to Boston. Leaving today, coming back in 4 days. I would like both departure times and arrival times to be in the afternoon.

utterances.text: Okay. What seating class do you prefer?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay. Do you prefer non stop or layover?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would prefer nonstop. But, like I said, price matters more. I would prefer an ounce.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Let me check for you. Hold on just a second. I found a flight for you, Jetblue airlines that departs at 3:58 p.m and arrives at 5:23 p.m, with a layover in long beach.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. That sounds fine. Can you book that for me?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You got it. Enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi.

utterances.text: How can I help you?

utterances.text: Hello Assistant, I'm looking for a round trip commercial airline flight from LA to Boston.

utterances.text: When will you be travelling?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have any other preferences?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like something cheap or non-stop is good. And I would like to leave in the afternoon.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Is it just for you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, Just for me.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have found a flight departing Los Angeles at 3:52 p.m arriving Boston at 12:13 am.

utterances.text: The cost is $466.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That sounds good. And what about the return flight?

utterances.text: Do you any preference for the return flight?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Great, Thank you so much for your help today.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Have a safe trip.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you so much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Good bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello. I need to find a round trip commercial flight from Los Angeles to Salt Lake City. I want to leave today and come back in 5 days. Please, find the latest flight possible.

utterances.text: Okay. That sounds great.

utterances.text: Let me see what I can find for you. I was actually able to find you non-stop flights for both the outbound and return flights and they are lower cost.

utterances.text: Okay, let me look.

utterances.text: This will just be a second.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright, I found a flight departing at 10:55 AM with United, there are two layovers, one in Newark and the other in Dublin.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I can make that work.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, the return flight is departing at 8:50 AM.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Good timing. That sounds fine to me.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright. Is there anything else I can help with?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Nothing else today. Thank you for this.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're welcome.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: See you later.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hi, could you get me a flight from San Francisco to LAX?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, how can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need to go tomorrow and then I need to come back in 3 days for the Spring Fashion Show. Can you get me flights for those specifications?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you want to leave in the morning or in the afternoon?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I prefer the cheapest for a round trip.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Did you come up with anything?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a flight at Delta Airlines. It departs at 8:00 AM  and arrives at 9:30 AM and your return flight departs at 9:55 AM and arrives at 12:03 PM. This flight serves cocktails.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Sure, I will do and bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Please book that flight and send me the information to my email and bye for now.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, I'm looking for round trip flight from New York City to Jamaica leaving today and coming back August 22nd. Earliest time of day possible on both flights, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Would you prefer a business class or economy?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Business class and also for total travel time, I want the quickest flight possible, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: There is a flight that departs at 9:35 pm from New York City Airport and arrives at Kingston at 6:40 pm.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay and how about the flight back?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The return flight would be at 9 am from Kingston and it arrives at 11:00 pm at NYC.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Alright, those sound good. Thank you very much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Would you like me to book the tickets for you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The tickets have been booked and the details have been emailed to you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you very much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Have a safe trip. Until next time. Bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thanks, goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hi. I'm looking for a flight to Berlin this Friday.

utterances.text: Hello.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: For five days.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright, perfect. So, there are handful flights, what do you want to fly coach business or economy first class?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: First class.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You are awesome, you're looking at $10,000 per ticket.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That's okay. Is it direct?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Great. Sounds good. Book it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: All right, you're all set. Enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.text: Hi user. I can help you with that, what day would you like to leave?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: April 18th, 2017.

utterances.text: And when would you like to get back?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: April 30th, 2017.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you have any preferences for the flight?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like a morning flight please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, let me check that for you. Please hold.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a flight for you with Air Canada at 7:20 am.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay I will book that for you now.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: My pleasure, Do you have any preferences for the return flight?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like a morning flight as well.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, let me get that for you. I found a flight for 9:40 am on the return flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you. That's acceptable.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Great, Is there anything else I can do for you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No. I'm all set. I'd just like to have my code, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, I'll look for that for you now.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: You're welcome.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I would like to find a round-trip commercial airline flight from Seattle to Boston. I will be departing today and returning in 4 days.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you want to leave in the morning or afternoon flight?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Afternoon.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What seating class do you prefer?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: The cheapest one.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you prefer a non stop or layover?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Non-Stop.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Let me check for you, hold on just a second.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a flight for you with Alaska airlines which departs at 3:40 P.M and arrives at 11:59 P.M.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Sounds good.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You're all set.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: All right. Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello. I'd like to take a round-trip ticket from Sacramento to Seattle-Tacoma.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What are those dates?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I will leave today and return in 5 days.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you want to leave in the morning or afternoon flight?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I want to leave in the morning.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you prefer non stop or layover?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No layovers, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Unfortunately there are no morning flights.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Evening would be okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a flight at Alaska Airlines departs at 6:55 PM and arrives at 8:53 PM. Your return flight departs at 6:19 am and arrives at 8:04 am.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Make sure that's a window seat if that's possible.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: You got it, enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Alright. Have a great and wonderful day.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hey, I'm headed out.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hello.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And I got to get a flight?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: To where?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'm going to Boston from San Francisco. I got to get out as soon as possible. I'm coming back on the 27th.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Are you ok with layovers ?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah, It should be just the cheapest flight that you can find.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I have one at 2:51, 4:30, 4:45.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Let's go for 2:51.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need the return flight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: For the return flight, I have a 7:32 a.m, 6:58 p.m, and 9:24 pm.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Could you get the earliest?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Yes, 7:32 AM.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 7:32 a.m, okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The flight has been booked.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you so much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need help finding a flight to Seattle, Washington.

utterances.text: I'll be flying out of JFK Airport.

utterances.text: Coach.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'll be leaving from March 20th to March 23rd.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay and what are the dates?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay. The best deal is $362 with Delta at 7:56 pm.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The return flight will be leaving at 3:22 pm. It is also Non-Stop.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: What's the price for round-trip?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That sounds awesome.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I'm glad you think it's awesome.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Can you go ahead and book it?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Your flight has been booked and I'll send you the details to your mail.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Welcome. Bye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Bye.

utterances.text: Hello!

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hello, I'm looking for a flight from New York to the Bahamas.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Can you give me some specifications?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yep, I need to fly out tomorrow on July 20th and return on July 21st. And I need to leave as early as possible.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What seating class do you prefer?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I prefer something cheap, whatever's cheapest.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Do you prefer non-stop or layover?

utterances.speaker: USER

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: One second.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a flight for you with JetBlue Airlines, that departs 9:40 AM and arrives at 12:30 PM. Your return flight departs at 4:31 PM and arrives at 8:37 AM.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That sounds perfect.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Thank you, enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Awesome, thanks.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Hi. I would like a flight to Seattle.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, great.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hold on for a second.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, where would you like to go from Seattle?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: San Diego.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, great. Do you have any preferences in mind?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, I don't.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright then, you can pick from Delta, Alaska, American or Southwest airlines.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Delta, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, the price for Delta airways is $207.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Anything else?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: No, I am all set.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Perfect. Have a great day. Enjoy your flight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi. How can I help you?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need a flight from Seattle to Houston for today.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, sounds good. When were you planning on leaving and returning for this trip?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: This afternoon and I'll come back in the next 5 days.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What class would you prefer to fly?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And I would prefer to fly commercial, so give me the cheapest flight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, the cheapest flight is $218 with one stop leaving at 11 P.M.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. I'll take it.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: And for your return flight, what preferences do you have?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Commercial, and I want the a non-stop flight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I found a non stop flight for $240 leaving at 9 A.M.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yeah. That sounds perfect.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, the details are sent to your email.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Thank you so much.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Have a safe flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Thank you.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Hi, How can I help?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes, I'm looking for a round trip to Paris.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: What dates are you looking to go?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like to leave early Sunday morning. Nonstop flight preferred.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Was that one way trip or a round trip?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That's going to be a round trip, but I'm coming back, I would like to stay 3 weeks, so exactly 3 weeks on a return flight. Nonstop flight round trip but I'm exactly Center.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: There are no flights leaving in the morning the earliest flight is leaving at 1:30 p.m. with Air Tahiti round trip for $1,392 non stop.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: And it's just for myself. And tell me more about the flight.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Air Tahiti Nui, it leaves at 1:30 p.m. and arrives at 9:30 a.m. it's an 11-hour flight nonstop.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: What seating?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: This is the economy class would you like me to look into?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Is there any first class on that flight?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: The only nonstop first class ticket is with Air France leaving at 6 o'clock p.m. for $15,193.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Cool. Let me get that, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Wonderful I go ahead and get that booked for you did you need help with anything else?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I prefer that, And oh god, just don't Please don't forget to email me the itinerary. And that should be it. Thanks so much. You're great.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I'll go ahead and email the itinerary as soon as possible you, have a wonderful day and have a safe flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Thank you.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I need help booking a flight to Paris, please.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Okay, from Houston to Paris?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Yes. That's right.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Alright, what else can you tell me?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: I'd like a nonstop flight if possible. I'd like to leave around noon if that's possible or maybe in the afternoon.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: For which days?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Between April 2nd and April 12th.

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: And what did you say about times?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: That I'd like to leave in the afternoon on a nonstop flight and I'd like to return in the morning.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Could you tell me a time on those dates that do have a nonstop?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: There is only one nonstop flight.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. And what time does that leave?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I see that it is leaving at 3:40 P.M on April 2.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. That sounds good. And what about the return flight? Can I get a nonstop for that?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: I see that there is one flight leaving at 10:10 A.M on April 12 for nonstop.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. Perfect. That sounds great. And what's the roundtrip fare?

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay. That will be fine. Would you mind booking that and sending me the details?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Sure, goodbye.

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Okay, thank you.
